query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "beyond scalar rewards by internalizing reasoning into score distributi" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (internalizing reasoning into score distributions via reward shaping and RL) and measures the same dependent variables (reasoning efficiency, length distributions, and correctness) that the user's question regarding "Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning" addresses. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and methodological context for extending work on efficient reasoning in LLMs.
